name: compression-ecg
objective: Evolve a lossless codec for MIT-BIH ECG (unpacked 16-bit waveforms) that maximizes compression ratio on a subject-disjoint holdout, beating the strongest general-purpose compressor (bzip2-9).
notes: primary = lossless ratio (raw/compressed) on the subject-disjoint holdout split; maximize. Deterministic evaluator (same candidate + frozen data => identical ratio), so default reverify settings hold. Bar to beat is the bzip2-9 baseline (~3.7-4.2x); gzip/zstd/xz are weaker. promote_eps 0.001 ignores sub-thousandth ratio wiggle. max_candidate_bytes caps the codec SOURCE (embed-the-answer guard). The gate is byte-exact roundtrip on every record + a static no-peeking import check (see evaluate.py).
